"Done. I left the finished CryptPad sheet open as the active tab, and the 15 Cars.com vehicle listing tabs are still open behind it.

Quick takeaways:
- Most common model: Chrysler Pacifica, 5 listings. Mazda CX-5 appears twice. Everything else appears once.
- Best value standouts:
  - 2024 Mazda CX-5, 17.8k miles, $28,348
  - 2025 Chrysler Pacifica L, 15.3k miles, $33,949
  - 2025 Volkswagen Atlas, 12.4k miles, $41,825
  - 2025 Hyundai Palisade, 28.5k miles, $39,149
  - 2022 Mitsubishi Outlander, 39.6k miles, $25,140
- Final mix: mostly SUVs/crossovers, 10 out of 15, with 5 minivans.
- I didn’t need Edmunds cross-checks because the kept listings came from Cars.com SUV/minivan filtered pages and the family use/body style was clear."
